scripts.deploy:firebase: npm --prefix cloud/functions install && cd cloud && firebase deploy --only functions,firestore:rules,firestore:indexes,database
scripts.deploy:allFunctionsBatched: npm --prefix cloud/functions install && npm --prefix cloud/functions run deploy:safe --
scripts.deploy:monsRustFunctions: npm --prefix cloud/functions install && npm --prefix cloud/functions run deploy:safe -- automatch updateRatings startMatchTimer claimMatchVictoryByTimer resolveWagerOutcome createEvent joinEvent postponeEventStart removeEventParticipant disqualifyEventMatchWinners syncEventState processEventProgress processEventProgressFallback
scripts.latest:functions: npx --yes npm-check-updates@latest -u --peer --packageFile cloud/functions/package.json && npm install --prefix cloud/functions
scripts.latest:admin: npx --yes npm-check-updates@latest -u --peer --packageFile cloud/admin/package.json && npm install --prefix cloud/admin
scripts.latest: npm run latest:root && npm run latest:functions && npm run latest:admin
